title: mazus miquelii
intro: Mazus miquelii, also known as Chinese mazus, is a type of flowering plant in the family Mazaceae. This perennial herb has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mazus miquelii include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and improve digestion. Mazus miquelii can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
